title: GrowGeneration (GRWG) Q3 2020 Earnings Match Estimates
text: The Zacks Consensus Estimate for third-quarter total sales was pegged at $47.3 million, suggesting growth of 117% from the prior-year quarter. The consensus mark for earnings per share was 6 cents, flat year over year. GrowGeneration's Earnings ESP was -20.00% with a Zacks Rank #3. GrowGeneration came out with quarterly earnings of $0.06 per share, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate, compared to earnings of $0.06 per share a year ago.
